hero.title: LocalPDF
hero.subtitle: Ultra-fast, privacy-first PDF tools that work entirely in your browser

private.title: 100% Private
private.description: Everything processed locally in your browser

whyChoose.title: Why LocalPDF?
whyChoose.subtitle: We make PDF work simple, fast, and secure

overview.title: Overview
overview.content: LocalPDF is fully committed to protecting your privacy. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.content: We do NOT collect, store, or transmit your files or personal data.

localProcessing.title: Local Processing
localProcessing.content: All PDF operations are performed exclusively in your browser. Files never leave your device.
